AuraSpend
Home

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: May 13, 2026

1. Data Collection

AuraSpend is designed with privacy first. Your financial data is stored locally on your device. We do not store your transactions on our own servers.

2. Google Drive Synchronization

If you enable cloud sync, AuraSpend uses the Google Drive API to store your backups in a hidden application folder. This data is only accessible by you and AuraSpend.

3. Third-Party Services

The free version of AuraSpend uses AdMob for advertising. AdMob may collect device identifiers to serve personalized ads. You can opt-out by upgrading to Premium.

4. User Rights

You have full control over your data. You can delete your local database or remove your Google Drive backup at any time.

Made with ❤️ by AW Builds
